title: Bash tool：agent 的持久 Shell 会话
title_en: Bash Tool: Persistent Shell Session for Agents

body.concept: Bash tool 让 Claude 在一个持久的 bash 会话中执行 shell 命令。"持久"意味着会话状态（环境变量、工作目录、变量赋值）在多次命令调用之间保持不变。它是 server tool（由 Anthropic 托管执行），你不需要自己运行命令——只需在 API 请求中声明这个工具，Claude 会自动决定何时使用它。它提供四项核心能力：持久会话状态、运行任意 shell 命令、访问环境变量和工作目录、命令链式调用和脚本编写。
body.analogy: 想象给 Claude 一台远程电脑的 SSH 终端。Claude 可以 cd 到某个目录、设环境变量、运行脚本——下一次调用时这些状态还在，就像你自己开着终端窗口一样。和 client tool（你在本地执行）不同，这个终端由 Anthropic 管理。
body.visual: API 请求 [tools: bash_tool] → Claude 决定运行命令 → Anthropic 服务器执行 shell → 结果返回 Claude → Claude 可链式继续执行更多命令 → 最终回答用户。整个过程中 shell 会话保持不变。

body_en.concept: The Bash tool lets Claude execute shell commands in a persistent bash session. 'Persistent' means session state — environment variables, working directory, variable assignments — survives across multiple tool calls. It's a server tool (hosted and executed by Anthropic), so you don't run the commands yourself — just declare the tool in your API request, and Claude decides when to use it. Four core capabilities: persistent session state, arbitrary shell commands, access to env vars and working directory, and command chaining/scripting.
body_en.analogy: Imagine giving Claude an SSH terminal to a remote machine. Claude can cd into directories, set env vars, run scripts — and on the next call, all that state is still there, just like leaving a terminal window open. Unlike a client tool (where you execute locally), this terminal is managed by Anthropic.
body_en.visual: API request [tools: bash_tool] → Claude decides to run command → Anthropic server executes shell → result returns to Claude → Claude can chain more commands → final answer to user. The shell session persists throughout.
